info.title: xUnit.net Console Runner
info.description:
A global .NET Core tool for running xunit tests.

Installation: dotnet tool install -g xunit-cli
Usage: xunit <assemblyPath> [additionalArgs]
    

This package was build from source code at https://github.com/natemcmaster/xunit-cli/tree/f7efd07a256c130eaafec55240da79b22858aa16

options.name: -nologo
options.description: : do not show the copyright message

options.name: -nocolor
options.description: : do not output results with colors

options.name: -failskips
options.description: : convert skipped tests into failures

options.name: -stoponfail
options.description: : stop on first test failure

options.name: -parallel
options.description:
: set parallelization based on option
:   none        - turn off all parallelization
:   collections - only parallelize collections
:   assemblies  - only parallelize assemblies
:   all         - parallelize assemblies & collections

options.name: -maxthreads
options.description:
: maximum thread count for collection parallelization
:   default   - run with default (1 thread per CPU thread)
:   unlimited - run with unbounded thread count
:   (number)  - limit task thread pool size to 'count'

options.name: -wait
options.description: : wait for input after completion

options.name: -diagnostics
options.description: : enable diagnostics messages for all test assemblies

options.name: -internaldiagnostics
options.description: : enable internal diagnostics messages for all test assemblies

options.name: -debug
options.description: : launch the debugger to debug the tests

options.name: -serialize
options.description: : serialize all test cases (for diagnostic purposes only)

options.name: -trait
options.description:
: only run tests with matching name/value traits
: if specified more than once, acts as an OR operation

options.name: -notrait
options.description:
: do not run tests with matching name/value traits
: if specified more than once, acts as an AND operation

options.name: -method
options.description:
: run a given test method (can be fully specified or use a wildcard;
: i.e., 'MyNamespace.MyClass.MyTestMethod' or '*.MyTestMethod')

options.name: -nomethod
options.description: : do not run a given test method (can be fully specified or use a wildcard;

options.name: -class
options.description:
: run all methods in a given test class (should be fully
: specified; i.e., 'MyNamespace.MyClass')

options.name: -noclass
options.description: : do not run any methods in a given test class (should be fully

options.name: -namespace
options.description:
: run all methods in a given namespace (i.e.,
: 'MyNamespace.MySubNamespace')

options.name: -nonamespace
options.description: : do not run any methods in a given namespace (i.e.,

options.name: -noautoreporters
options.description:
: do not allow reporters to be auto-enabled by environment
: (for example, auto-detecting TeamCity or AppVeyor)

options.name: -framework
options.description:
: set the target framework
Reporters: (optional, choose only one)

options.name: -appveyor
options.description: : forces AppVeyor CI mode (normally auto-detected)

options.name: -json
options.description: : show progress messages in JSON format

options.name: -quiet
options.description: : do not show progress messages

options.name: -teamcity
options.description: : forces TeamCity mode (normally auto-detected)

options.name: -verbose
options.description: : show verbose progress messages

options.name: -vsts
options.description:
: forces VSTS CI mode (normally auto-detected)
Result formats: (optional, choose one or more)

options.name: -xml
options.description: : output results to xUnit.net v2 XML file

options.name: -xmlv1
options.description: : output results to xUnit.net v1 XML file

options.name: -html
options.description: : output results to HTML file

options.name: -nunit
options.description: : output results to NUnit v2.5 XML file

options.name: -junit
options.description: : output results to JUnit XML file

options.name: -x86
options.description: : Force tests to run in an x86 process (Windows, .NET Framework only)
